name: career-ops
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for Career-Ops, the file-based job-search command center.

interface.shortDescription: Evaluate jobs, scan portals, generate PDFs, and manage the job-search pipeline from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Career-Ops is a file-based job-search operating system. This repo-local Codex plugin mirrors the Claude command surface while preserving the existing Node, Playwright, Go, Markdown, YAML, and TSV workflows.
defaultPrompt: Evaluate this job URL with Career-Ops and run the full pipeline.
Scan my configured portals for new roles that match my profile.
Generate the tailored ATS PDF for this role using Career-Ops.
